title: MediaProgram
description: A MOME program, initiative, or designated resource beyond film permitting — 'Made in NY' marketing/discount programs, the Office of Nightlife, IFP/workforce and training programs, press credentials, and PublicAccessMedia (the borough public-access TV organizations MOME designates and oversees: MNN, BronxNet, BRIC/BCAT, QPTV, Staten Island Community TV). GAP: MOME publishes none of these as Open Data; they exist only as HTML on nyc.gov/site/mome. Modeled here so an agent can enumerate MOME's non-permit surface.

name.description: Program / resource name (e.g. 'Made in NY Marketing Credit', 'Public Access Media', 'Office of Nightlife').

audience.description: Who it serves (productions, nightlife venues, residents, press, community media).

publicAccessProvider.description: For PublicAccessMedia programs, the borough public-access organization MOME designates.
